opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Covered our ruined $800 couch with a $49 waterproof cover — looks brand new
opportunities.before_state: Faded, pet-hair-covered sofa with visible stains and claw marks from cats/dogs
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, fitted couch that looks freshly purchased with zero visible damage
opportunities.why_now: Memorial Day weekend triggers a surge in 'refresh the living room' impulse buys and pet owners searching before summer guests arrive.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm Original Side Sleeper Pillow with cutout

opportunities.before_state: Flat generic pillow causing neck stiffness, shoulder pain, and poor sleep quality
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic support aligned to side-sleeping posture, waking refreshed without neck pain
buyer_intent_keywords: best pillow for side sleepers neck pain
pillow for shoulder pain side sleeper

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia professional chef knife set with block
opportunities.transformation_hook: Replaced our 10-year-old dull knives for $55 — prep time literally cut in half

opportunities.after_state: Uniform knife block display, razor-sharp blades, professional-looking clean kitchen counter
